subject: fix(theme): fix project.html burger menu and stale comment
body:
project.html burger menu used the hidden HTML attribute, but theme.js
toggles visibility via CSS classes (opacity, pointer-events, scale).
The hidden attribute overrides all CSS, so the menu never opened.
Replaced with the same class-based transition pattern from index.html.

Also fixed a stale comment in theme.js that said "Toggle hidden
attribute" when the code actually uses opacity+scale transitions.

Tags: bugfix, ui, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
